name: AllPredicate
javadoc:
/** * Predicate implementation that returns true if all the * predicates return true. * If the array of predicates is empty, then this predicate returns true. *

* NOTE: In versions prior to 3.2 an array size of zero or one * threw an exception. * * @since 3.0 * @version $Id: AllPredicate.java 1686855 2015-06-22 13:00:27Z tn $ */

members.name: AllPredicate
members.javadoc: /** * Constructor that performs no validation. * Use allPredicate if you want that. * * @param predicates the predicates to check, not cloned, not null */

tags.name: predicates
tags.content: the predicates to check, not cloned, not null

members.name: allPredicate
members.javadoc:
/** * Factory to create the predicate. *

* If the array is size zero, the predicate always returns true. * If the array is size one, then that predicate is returned. * * @param the type that the predicate queries * @param predicates the predicates to check, cloned, not null * @return the all predicate * @throws NullPointerException if the predicates array is null * @throws NullPointerException if any predicate in the array is null */

tags.name: <T>
tags.content: the type that the predicate queries

tags.name: predicates
tags.content: the predicates to check, cloned, not null

tags.name: NullPointerException
tags.content: if the predicates array is null

tags.name: NullPointerException
tags.content: if any predicate in the array is null

members.name: allPredicate
members.javadoc:
/** * Factory to create the predicate. *

* If the collection is size zero, the predicate always returns true. * If the collection is size one, then that predicate is returned. * * @param the type that the predicate queries * @param predicates the predicates to check, cloned, not null * @return the all predicate * @throws NullPointerException if the predicates array is null * @throws NullPointerException if any predicate in the array is null */

tags.name: <T>
tags.content: the type that the predicate queries

tags.content: the predicates to check, cloned, not null

tags.name: NullPointerException
tags.content: if the predicates array is null

tags.content: if any predicate in the array is null

members.name: evaluate
members.javadoc:
/**
 * Evaluates the predicate returning true if all predicates return true.
 *
 * @param object  the input object
 * @return true if all decorated predicates return true
 */

tags.content: if all decorated predicates return true
